info.description: Versioned ExecAss control-plane contract generated from carsinos-protocol DTO schemas.
info.title: CarsinOS ExecAss API

parameters.description: Decision identifier.
parameters.name: decision_id

parameters.description: Required stable key for safe retry. It must match the request body's idempotency_key.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

200.description: The resolved decision and delegation state.

404.description: The requested ExecAss record was not found.

409.description: The resource revision or idempotency key conflicts.

422.description: The requested state transition is not valid.

500.description: The operation could not be completed safely.
